creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
(In reply to Stefan Ehmann from comment #29)

Just to shed some light on the emulators/mednafen port and bug #281614:
emulators/mednafen has always build its own bundled copy of musepack. It was just with my patch to upgrade to version 1.32.1 where I have unbundled most dependencies which are available in the ports tree and as a result audio/musepack got added as a dependency to the emulators/mednafen port.
